derappp 0.9.2
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Concept for the data repository
  • Changelog

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Elisabeth Lutz. Author.
    luel,aquatic toxicity data

  • Marcel Mathis. Author.
    mamr,aquatic toxicity data

  • Laurent Boualit. Contributor.
    bolr,aquatic toxicity data

  • Jhoniel Perdigon Ferreira. Contributor.
    pejh,soil toxicity data, review of aquatic toxicity data

  • Daniel Baumgartner. Contributor.
    SMILES codes for pyrethroid stereoisomers

  • Fabian Balk. Reviewer.
    bafa,review of soil toxicity data

  • Johannes Ranke. Author, maintainer.
    rajo

  • European Food Safety Authority. Data contributor.
    EFSA conclusions, bibliographic information in OpenFoodTox, Renewal Assessment Reports

  • British Crop Protection Council. Data contributor.
    Chemical identity information from the Compendium of Pesticide Common Names

  • National Center for Biotechnology Information. Data contributor.
    Chemical identity information retrieved from the PubChem website

  • CAS division of the American Chemical Society. Data contributor.
    Chemical identity information retreived from the CAS Common Chemistry website

  • enviPath UG & Co KG. Data contributor.
    Chemical identity information retreived from the envipath website

  • Agroscope. Copyright holder.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Lutz E, Mathis M, Ranke J (2026). derappp: Data for Environmental Risk Assessment of Plant Protection Products. R package version 0.9.2, https://agroscope-ch.github.io/derappp/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {derappp: Data for Environmental Risk Assessment of Plant Protection Products},
  author = {Elisabeth Lutz and Marcel Mathis and Johannes Ranke},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.9.2},
  url = {https://agroscope-ch.github.io/derappp/},
}

On this page

Developed by Elisabeth Lutz, Marcel Mathis, Johannes Ranke.
